findings.description: Unit test uses readFileSync to read source file as string instead of importing and rendering component
findings.evidence: import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const source = readFileSync('src/lib/...', 'utf-8');

findings.description: Missing FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY on users table
findings.evidence: ALTER TABLE users ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; -- missing FORCE
findings.fix_hint: Add: ALTER TABLE users FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

findings.description: mapRow() helper duplicated in 4 component files
findings.evidence: function mapRow(row) { return { ...row, created_at: new Date(row.created_at) } }
findings.fix_hint: Extract to shared utility in src/lib/utils/mappers.ts

findings.description: Hardcoded string not using i18n translation function
Relation field uses plain dropdown instead of searchable picker — deferred per Decision D5 (Complex entity field UX enhancements deferred)
